mapper.sql: T.TALENT_ID AS talentId, T.BIZ_NO AS bizNo, T.TITLE AS title, T.TALENT_TYPE AS talentType, T.CAPACITY AS capacity, T.CURRENT_CNT AS currentCnt, T.SCHEDULE AS schedule, T.DURATION AS duration, T.LOCATION AS location, T.CONTACT AS contact, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(T.BODY, 32000, 1) AS body, T.THUMB_URL AS thumbUrl, T.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, T.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, T.ADMIN_NO AS adminNo, T.REG_DATE AS regDate, T.APPROVE_DATE AS approveDate, B.BIZ_ID AS bizId, B.BIZ_NAME AS bizName, B.BIZ_TYPE AS bizType
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TB_TALENT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_TALENT ( TALENT_ID, BIZ_NO, TITLE, TALENT_TYPE, CAPACITY, CURRENT_CNT, SCHEDULE, DURATION, LOCATION, CONTACT, BODY, THUMB_URL, STATUS_CD, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{talentId}, #{bizNo}, #{title}, #{talentType}, #{capacity}, NVL(#{currentCnt}, 0), #{schedule}, #{duration}, #{location}, #{contact}, #{body}, #{thumbUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{statusCd}, 'PENDING'), SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TB_TALENT T JOIN TB_BUSINESS B ON B.BIZ_NO = T.BIZ_NO WHERE T.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED'
AND T.TALENT_TYPE = #{talentType}
ORDER BY T.APPROVE_DATE DESC NULLS LAST, T.REG_DATE DESC

SELECT
FROM TB_TALENT T JOIN TB_BUSINESS B ON B.BIZ_NO = T.BIZ_NO WHERE T.TALENT_ID = #{talentId}

SELECT
FROM TB_TALENT T JOIN TB_BUSINESS B ON B.BIZ_NO = T.BIZ_NO WHERE T.STATUS_CD = #{statusCd} ORDER BY T.REG_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_TALENT SET STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, REJECT_REASON = #{rejectReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADMIN_NO = #{adminNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, APPROVE_DATE = CASE WHEN #{statusCd} = 'APPROVED' THEN SYSDATE ELSE APPROVE_DATE END WHERE TALENT_ID = #{talentId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TB_TALENT T JOIN TB_BUSINESS B ON B.BIZ_NO = T.BIZ_NO WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} ORDER BY T.REG_DATE DESC
SELECT STATUS_CD FROM TB_BUSINESS WHERE BIZ_ID = #{bizId} AND STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT BIZ_NO FROM TB_BUSINESS WHERE BIZ_ID = #{bizId} AND STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' AND ROWNUM = 1
